scripts.typechain:generate: pnpm run build && pnpm run typechain --target=ethers-v6 ./out/CSUC.sol/CSUC.json ./out/CurvyAggregator.sol/CurvyAggregator.json ./out/CurvyAggregator_CSUC_ActionHandler.sol/CurvyAggregator_CSUC_ActionHandler.json --out-dir=./generated/types
scripts.cleanup: rm -rf cache cache_hardhat out artifacts snapshots
scripts.deploy:preparation: pnpm run cleanup && source $CURVY_CONTRACTS_ENV_FILE_PATH && mkdir -p ./deployments/$CHAIN_NAME && rm -rf ./deployments/$CHAIN_NAME/*.address
scripts.simulate:deploy:csuc: pnpm run cleanup && source $CURVY_CONTRACTS_ENV_FILE_PATH && forge script ./script/CSUC_Deploy.s.sol:CSUC_Deploy_Script --rpc-url $RPC_URL
scripts.simulate:deploy:all: pnpm deploy:preparation && pnpm simulate:deploy:csuc && pnpm deploy:zk-verifiers && pnpm simulate:deploy:aggregator && pnpm simulate:integration:csuc-aggregator
scripts.deploy:all: pnpm deploy:preparation && pnpm deploy:csuc && pnpm deploy:zk-verifiers && pnpm deploy:aggregator && pnpm deploy:integration:csuc-aggregator
scripts.simulate:deploy:mockERC20: pnpm run cleanup && source $CURVY_CONTRACTS_ENV_FILE_PATH && forge script ./script/MockERC20_Deploy.s.sol:MockERC20_Deploy_Script --rpc-url $RPC_URL
scripts.simulate:deploy:multicall3: pnpm run cleanup && source $CURVY_CONTRACTS_ENV_FILE_PATH && forge script ./script/Multicall3_Deploy.s.sol:Multicall3_Deploy_Script --rpc-url $RPC_URL
scripts.sanity-checks:all: pnpm sanity-checks:csuc-wrap && pnpm sanity-checks:csuc-transfer && pnpm sanity-checks:csuc-unwrap
scripts.deploy:all:localnet: cp ./.env.localnet ./.env && export CURVY_CONTRACTS_ENV_FILE_PATH=./.env && pnpm run deploy:all && pnpm run deploy:mockERC20:localnet && pnpm run deploy:multicall3:localnet
